hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】美联储理事米兰递交辞呈，支持沃什出任新任主席；【CRYPTO】随着参议院银行委员会通过《澄清法案》，XRP、DOGE 飙升 5%，比特币突破 81,000 美元；【FINANCE】凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 获得参议院批准，担任下一任美联储主席。

items.title: Fed Governor Miran submits resignation, throws support behind Warsh as new chair
items.summary: Miran served as a contrarian voice on the rate-setting Federal Open Market Committee.
items.title_zh: 美联储理事米兰递交辞呈，支持沃什出任新任主席
items.summary_zh: 米兰在制定利率的联邦公开市场委员会中担任逆向声音。

items.title: XRP, DOGE surge 5%, bitcoin above $81,000 as CLARITY Act clears Senate banking panel
items.summary: Crypto majors bid higher Friday after the Digital Asset Market Clarity Act cleared the Senate Banking Committee in a 15-9 bipartisan vote, with XRP and dogecoin leading the cohort even as broader risk assets sold off on Trump's comments that the US does not need to reopen the Str
items.title_zh: 随着参议院银行委员会通过《澄清法案》，XRP、DOGE 飙升 5%，比特币突破 81,000 美元
items.summary_zh: 周五，《数字资产市场清晰度法案》以 15 比 9 的两党投票通过了参议院银行委员会，其中 XRP 和狗狗币领先，尽管特朗普表示美国不需要重新开放战略，导致更广泛的风险资产遭到抛售。

items.title: Kevin Warsh wins Senate confirmation as the next Federal Reserve chair
items.summary: In the most divisive vote ever for a Fed chair, Warsh, 56, won confirmation to take over for Jerome Powell.
items.title_zh: 凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 获得参议院批准，担任下一任美联储主席
items.summary_zh: 在有史以来最具争议性的美联储主席投票中，56 岁的沃什获得确认接替杰罗姆·鲍威尔 (Jerome Powell)。

items.title: Traders believe inflation could near 5% this year
items.summary: Prediction market traders see two-in-three odds that inflation will go above 4.5% this year, and nearly 40% odds that prices will accelerate above 5%.
items.title_zh: 交易员认为今年通胀率可能接近 5%
items.summary_zh: 预测市场交易者认为今年通胀率将超过 4.5% 的可能性为三分之二，而物价将加速超过 5% 的可能性接近 40%。

items.title: Clarity Act clears U.S. Senate committee, on its way to a final test in Congress
items.summary: After a bipartisan approval in the Senate Banking Committee, the crypto market structure bill now advances to a final overhaul aimed at Senate and House passage.
items.title_zh: 《澄清法案》获得美国参议院委员会批准，即将在国会接受最终测试
items.summary_zh: 在参议院银行委员会获得两党批准后，加密货币市场结构法案现已进入最终改革阶段，旨在参议院和众议院通过。

items.title: Sea's View on the Future of Agentic Software Development with Codex
items.summary: Sea Limited's CPO explains why the company is deploying Codex across engineering teams to accelerate AI-native software development in Asia.
items.title_zh: Sea 对 Codex 代理软件开发未来的看法
items.summary_zh: Sea Limited 的 CPO 解释了该公司为何在工程团队中部署 Codex 以加速亚洲 AI 原生软件的开发。

items.title: Helping ChatGPT better recognize context in sensitive conversations
items.summary: Learn how new ChatGPT safety updates improve context awareness in sensitive conversations, helping detect risk over time and respond more safely.
items.title_zh: 帮助 ChatGPT 更好地识别敏感对话中的上下文
items.summary_zh: 了解新的 ChatGPT 安全更新如何提高敏感对话中的上下文感知，帮助随着时间的推移检测风险并更安全地做出响应。

items.title: Xi warns Trump: Mishandling Taiwan will put U.S.-China relationship in 'great jeopardy'
items.summary: President Donald Trump met Chinese President Xi Jinping in Beijing on Thursday morning for the start of a high-stakes summit that runs through Friday.
items.title_zh: 习近平警告特朗普：对台湾处理不当将使美中关系陷入“巨大危险”
items.summary_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统周四上午在北京会见了中国国家主席习近平，开始了持续到周五的高风险峰会。

items.title: Trump in China: Traders predict a tariff truce extension and Boeing aircraft purchases
items.summary: Traders also think it is likely that the president will talk about Iran, despite his comments that the U.S. doesn't need China's help in resolving the war.
items.title_zh: 特朗普在中国：交易员预测关税休战将延长并购买波音飞机
items.summary_zh: 交易员还认为，总统很可能会谈论伊朗问题，尽管他表示美国不需要中国帮助解决战争。

items.title: Warning of record global temperatures as chance of very strong El Niño grows
items.summary: As El Niño develops this year, scientists are increasingly confident it could be one of the strongest on record with global consequences, as Simon King explains.
items.title_zh: 强烈厄尔尼诺现象的可能性增加，全球气温将创历史新高
items.summary_zh: 正如西蒙·金（Simon King）解释的那样，随着今年厄尔尼诺现象的发展，科学家们越来越有信心它可能是有记录以来最强烈的厄尔尼诺现象之一，并对全球产生影响。

items.title: War criminal Ratko Mladić's jail release request denied
items.summary: A UN judge admits the 84-year-old is "in the final stages of his life", but says prison conditions in The Hague ensure his maximum comfort.
items.title_zh: 战犯拉特科·姆拉迪奇的释放请求被拒绝
items.summary_zh: 一名联合国法官承认这位 84 岁的老人“正处于生命的最后阶段”，但表示海牙的监狱条件确保了他最大的舒适度。

items.title: Key Moments From the First Day of Trump’s China Visit
items.summary: During the first round of two days of talks, Xi Jinping issued a stern warning about Taiwan while Trump touted all the top business leaders in his delegation.
items.title_zh: 特朗普访华首日的关键时刻
items.summary_zh: 在为期两天的第一轮会谈中，习近平对台湾发出了严厉警告，而特朗普则吹捧了其代表团中的所有商界领袖。

items.title: Nigel Farage, Leader of Reform UK, Says £5 Million Gift Was ‘Reward’ for Brexit
items.summary: Nigel Farage, the leader of the populist right-wing party, had previously said the money was for personal security.
items.title_zh: 英国改革党领袖奈杰尔·法拉奇表示，500万英镑的礼物是英国脱欧的“奖励”
items.summary_zh: 民粹主义右翼政党领导人奈杰尔·法拉奇此前曾表示，这笔钱是用于个人安全。

items.title: Saudi Arabia and U.A.E. Carried Out Secret Attacks in Iran, U.S. Officials Say
items.summary: The Gulf Arab states have been grappling with how to deter Iran after the war made clear the limits of American security guarantees.
items.title_zh: 沙特阿拉伯和阿联酋美国官员称在伊朗发动秘密袭击
items.summary_zh: 战争明确了美国安全保证的局限性后，海湾阿拉伯国家一直在努力解决如何威慑伊朗的问题。

items.title: Duterte Ally Flees to Evade I.C.C. Arrest Warrant After Chaos at Philippine Senate
items.summary: Senator Ronald dela Rosa, who is wanted by the International Criminal Court in The Hague, had been holed up in the building when shots rang out.
items.title_zh: 杜特尔特盟友逃离国际刑事法院菲律宾参议院混乱后发出逮捕令
items.summary_zh: 枪声响起时，被海牙国际刑事法院通缉的参议员罗纳德·德拉·罗莎正躲在大楼里。

items.title: Hana Bank acquires $670 million stake in Upbit parent Dunamu
items.summary: The acquisition of 2.28 million shares will give Hana Bank a 6.55% stake in Dunamu, making it the fourth-largest shareholder.
items.title_zh: 韩亚银行 (Hana Bank) 以 6.7 亿美元收购 Upbit 母公司 Dunamu 的股份
items.summary_zh: 此次收购228万股将使韩亚银行持有Dunamu 6.55%的股份，成为第四大股东。

items.title: Trump’s latest disclosure shows Coinbase, Strategy, MARA purchases in Q1
items.summary: Among the Coinbase-related purchases, the largest transaction was a Feb. 10 purchase valued between $100,001 and $250,000.
items.title_zh: 特朗普最新披露的信息显示第一季度 Coinbase、Strategy、MARA 的购买情况
items.summary_zh: 在与 Coinbase 相关的购买中，最大一笔交易是 2 月 10 日的一笔购买，价值在 100,001 美元至 250,000 美元之间。

items.title: Bitwise Hyperliquid ETF to start trading on NYSE this Friday
items.summary: The Bitwise Hyperliquid ETF will offer staking through the company’s in-house staking division Bitwise Onchain Solutions.
items.title_zh: Bitwise Hyperliquid ETF 将于本周五在纽约证券交易所开始交易
items.summary_zh: Bitwise Hyperliquid ETF 将通过公司内部质押部门 Bitwise Onchain Solutions 提供质押服务。

items.title: Strive shares jump on ‘daily dividend company’ strategy as firm goes debt free
items.summary: Strive said SATA will become the first U.S.-listed security to pay cash dividends every business day as its BTC holdings climb.
items.title_zh: 随着公司摆脱债务，Strive股价因“每日股息公司”战略而上涨
items.summary_zh: Strive表示，随着其比特币持有量的增加，SATA将成为第一家在每个工作日支付现金股息的美国上市证券。

items.title: What Parameter Golf taught us about AI-assisted research
items.summary: Parameter Golf brought together 1,000+ participants and 2,000+ submissions to explore AI-assisted machine learning research, coding agents, quantization, and novel model design under strict constraints.
items.title_zh: 参数高尔夫教会了我们关于人工智能辅助研究的哪些知识
items.summary_zh: Parameter Golf 汇聚了 1,000 多名参与者和 2,000 多份提交材料，在严格约束下探索人工智能辅助机器学习研究、编码代理、量化和新颖模型设计。

items.title: How ChatGPT adoption broadened in early 2026
items.summary: ChatGPT adoption surged in Q1 2026, with fastest growth among users over 35 and more balanced gender usage, signaling broader mainstream AI adoption.
items.title_zh: ChatGPT 的采用率如何在 2026 年初扩大
items.summary_zh: ChatGPT 的采用率在 2026 年第一季度激增，其中 35 岁以上的用户增长最快，性别使用更加平衡，这表明主流 AI 的采用更加广泛。

items.title: Celebrating 20 years of Google Translate: Fun facts, tips and new features to try
items.summary: Google’s sharing 20 fun facts to celebrate Google Translate turning 20, from its roots as a 2006 AI experiment to supporting almost 250 languages today.
items.title_zh: 庆祝 Google 翻译 20 周年：有趣的事实、提示和值得尝试的新功能
items.summary_zh: 谷歌分享了 20 个有趣的事实来庆祝谷歌翻译成立 20 周年，从 2006 年的人工智能实验到如今支持近 250 种语言。

items.title: Games people — and machines — play: Untangling strategic reasoning to advance AI
items.summary: Assistant Professor Gabriele Farina mines the foundations of decision-making in complex multi-agent scenarios.
items.title_zh: 人和机器玩的游戏：理清战略推理以推进人工智能
items.summary_zh: 助理教授 Gabriele Farina 挖掘复杂多智能体场景中决策的基础。

items.title: The MIT-IBM Computing Research Lab launches to shape the future of AI and quantum computing
items.summary: Building on a long-standing MIT–IBM collaboration, the new lab will chart the convergence of AI, algorithms, and quantum computing.
items.title_zh: MIT-IBM 计算研究实验室成立，塑造人工智能和量子计算的未来
items.summary_zh: 新实验室建立在 MIT 与 IBM 长期合作的基础上，将绘制人工智能、算法和量子计算的融合图。

items.title: The two- and ten-year Treasury yields hit a 12-month high. Bitcoin is still stuck below its 200-day average.
items.summary: Rising yields may act as a headwind for assets like bitcoin and gold while potentially benefiting tokenized Treasury markets.
items.title_zh: 两年期和十年期国债收益率触及12个月高点。比特币仍低于 200 日均线。
items.summary_zh: 收益率上升可能会对比特币和黄金等资产构成阻力，同时可能有利于代币化的国债市场。

items.title: Bitcoin hits $82,000, Coinbase leads crypto stock gains as Clarity Act advances
items.summary: The upbeat public debut of AI chipmaker Cerebras is also helping to lift both crypto and traditional markets.
items.title_zh: 随着《清晰法案》的推进，比特币触及 82,000 美元，Coinbase 引领加密货币股票上涨
items.summary_zh: 人工智能芯片制造商 Cerebras 的乐观公开亮相也有助于提振加密货币和传统市场。

items.title: Chainlink CCIP gains over $2.5 billion in TVL from protocols migrating from LayerZero, with Kraken Bitcoin the latest to join
items.summary: Kraken Bitcoin is at least the fourth product to deprecate its LayerZero cross-chain tech following the Kelp DAO attack.
items.title_zh: Chainlink CCIP 通过从 LayerZero 迁移的协议获得了超过 25 亿美元的 TVL，Kraken 比特币是最新加入的
items.summary_zh: Kraken 比特币至少是继 Kelp DAO 攻击之后第四个弃用其 LayerZero 跨链技术的产品。

items.title: JPMorgan says ether and altcoins could keep underperforming bitcoin without stronger activity
items.summary: That is "unlikely to change unless we see meaningful improvements in network activity, DeFi and real world applications," the analysts said.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通表示，如果没有更强劲的活动，以太币和山寨币的表现可能会继续落后于比特币
items.summary_zh: 分析师表示，这种情况“不太可能改变，除非我们看到网络活动、DeFi 和现实世界应用程序出现有意义的改进”。

items.title: Our response to the TanStack npm supply chain attack
items.summary: OpenAI details its response to the TanStack “Mini Shai-Hulud” supply chain attack, outlines protections taken to secure systems and signing certificates, and explains why macOS users must update OpenAI apps by June 12, 2026. Learn what happened, what was affected, and how OpenAI

items.title: Beacon Biosignals is mapping the brain during sleep
items.summary: Founded by Jake Donoghue PhD ’19 and former MIT researcher Jarrett Revels, the company is creating an AI-driven platform to help diagnose and treat disease.
items.title_zh: Beacon Biosignals 正在绘制睡眠期间的大脑图
items.summary_zh: 该公司由 Jake Donoghue 博士 '19 和前麻省理工学院研究员 Jarrett Revels 创立，正在创建一个人工智能驱动的平台来帮助诊断和治疗疾病。

items.title: Making the case for curiosity-driven science
items.summary: President Sally Kornbluth spoke in front of a packed crowd about growing challenges to the U.S. research ecosystem as funding for America’s top research universities becomes increasingly strained.
items.title_zh: 为好奇心驱动的科学提供理由

items.title: Solving the “Whac-a-mole dilemma”: A smarter way to debias AI vision models
items.summary: A new debiasing technique called WRING avoids creating or amplifying biases that can occur with existing debiasing approaches.

items.title: UFC's Dana White urges Trump to reverse gambling tax law. His letter moved the prediction market

items.title: U.S. can hold AI talks with China because ‘we are in the lead,’ Bessent tells CNBC as nations plan safety protocol
